# V3tt3d — AI-Powered Product Reviews

V3tt3d (https://v3tt3d.com) is an AI-powered product review site covering tech, software, VPN, hosting, AI tools, fitness tech, and home office products.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://v3tt3d.com/
- VPN Reviews: https://v3tt3d.com/category/software
- Best Deals: https://v3tt3d.com/deals
- NordVPN vs ExpressVPN: https://v3tt3d.com/reviews/nordvpn-vs-expressvpn-2026

## Affiliate Disclosure
This site earns commissions from qualifying purchases. All reviews are independently written.
